description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by a ring of trees, featuring a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The structure is primarily white with some dark gray accents, and it includes large windows and a visible balcony or terrace area. The main entrance is sheltered by a small overhang, and the building appears to have a garage attached to one side. The landscaping is minimal, with the house set in a sparse grove of both green and purple-leaved trees. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on straight lines and open spaces. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, contributing to the modern aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed white bungalow with large windows, a garage, and a balcony, surrounded by a sparse ring of green and purple trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, balcony, and a clear arrangement of trees encircling the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid wall with minimal windows and the continuation of the tree ring.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, more windows, and the surrounding trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the garage and a portion of the balcony visible, along with the tree arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
